label: About
title: About Playable Archive in Section
short_blurb: A daily generated front page where the image is the interface.
body: Daily Frontpage is a daily generated interactive front page. Each edition starts from recent saved signals and source research, becomes a new image-led scene, and stays explorable in the archive. The image is the interface: visible marks, objects, and surfaces in the scene open the real sources that shaped the day.

This iteration began with 81 recent saved-signal files and 79 captured links, then narrowed the page to 9 source windows around @LudensLudonauta: Still using Game Design Documents as a solo indie dev? This is how the cool... and Get inspired by 19 of the most interesting indie game devs, plus 7 more. A source image from creativeuncut.com helped set the palette, contrast, edge behavior, and gesture. The scene became Playable Archive in Section: Architectural section, camera plate grammar: a broad horizontal cutaway plate with stacked terrain-like strata, not a wall or signal board. After the image was made, a plate-reading pass mapped 9 visible regions and the mask audit tightened them against central blue glass cathedral seam, large parchment archive chamber, and lower-left oval gameplay vault.

typography.rationale: Bricolage Grotesque and Space Grotesk fit record, arcade, and listening-room editions while Fraunces keeps source captions tactile.
